items.title: Joel Klatt: Momentum Builds For 24-Team CFP As SEC Faces Defining Week
items.summary: Will we get a 24-team College Football Playoff? Here is what Joel Klatt is hearing.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: SRH win big but RCB, GT seal top two spots
items.summary: Fifties from Kishan, Klaasen and Abhishek propelled SRH to a massive score, but RCB ensured their net run-rate stayed good enough to take them to Qualifier 1
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: SPFL investigates Celtic games and play-off fixtures
items.summary: SPFL disciplinary investigations are launched into two Celtic games, a League 1 fixture and two lower league play-off matches.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
